# nix

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `nix`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `nix.assumeXdg` | `boolean` | Whether Home Manager should assume that Nix is configured to use XDG base directories. Note that this doesn’t change the behavior of Nix. To do that, set nix.settings.use-xdg-base-directories instead. This option is intended for settings in which use-xdg-base-directories is set globally or nix.conf is unmanaged by Home Manager. |
| `nix.buildMachines` | `list of (submodule)` | This option lists the machines to be used if distributed builds are enabled (see nix.distributedBuilds ). Nix will perform derivations on those machines via SSH by copying the inputs to the Nix store on the remote machine, starting the build, then copying the output back to the local Nix store. |
| `nix.channels` | `attribute set of package` | A declarative alternative to Nix channels. Whereas with stock channels, you would register URLs and fetch them into the Nix store with nix-channel (1) , this option allows you to register the store path directly. One particularly useful example is registering flake inputs as channels. |
| `nix.checkConfig` | `boolean` | If enabled (the default), checks for data type mismatches and that Nix can parse the generated nix.conf. |
| `nix.distributedBuilds` | `boolean` | Whether to distribute builds to the machines listed in nix.buildMachines . |
| `nix.enable` | | |
| `nix.extraOptions` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Additional text appended to nix.conf . |
| `nix.gc.automatic` | `boolean` | Automatically run the garbage collector at a specific time. |
| `nix.gc.dates` | `(optionally newline-terminated) single-line string or list of string` | When to run the Nix garbage collector. |
| `nix.gc.frequency` | | |
| `nix.gc.options` | `null or string` | Options given to nix-collect-garbage when the garbage collector is run automatically. |
| `nix.gc.persistent` | `boolean` | If true, the time when the service unit was last triggered is stored on disk. When the timer is activated, the service unit is triggered immediately if it would have been triggered at least once during the time when the timer was inactive. |
| `nix.gc.randomizedDelaySec` | `(optionally newline-terminated) single-line string` | Add a randomized delay before each garbage collection. The delay will be chosen between zero and this value. This value must be a time span in the format specified by systemd.time (7) |
| `nix.keepOldNixPath` | `boolean` | Whether nix.nixPath should keep the previously set values in NIX_PATH . |
| `nix.nixPath` | `list of string` | Adds new directories to the Nix expression search path. |
| `nix.package` | `null or package` | The nix package to use. |
| `nix.registry` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | User level flake registry. |
| `nix.registryVersion` | | |
| `nix.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (Nix config atom (null, bool, int, float, str, path or package) or list of (Nix config atom (null, bool, int, float, str, path or package)))` | Configuration for Nix; see nix.conf (5) for available options. The value declared here will be translated directly to the key-value pairs Nix expects. |
| `nix.useXdg` | | |
